response.justification: Bogdan possesses an exceptional technical background in engineering productivity, developer tooling, and testing infrastructure, perfectly aligning with the domain requirements of the role. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of formal people management, such as conducting one-on-ones, setting performance expectations, and leading organizational change, which are critical minimum requirements for a Level II Manager position.
strengths: Extensive experience building developer tools, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Altom Consulting).
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through Staff-level roles, founding an open-source platform, and organizing technical workshops.
Relevant mobile platform ecosystem knowledge from developing iOS/Apple TV apps and mobile device orchestration tools.
concerns: No explicit experience in formal people management, direct team leadership, or conducting performance reviews.
Lacks demonstrated experience in leading broad organizational change as expected of a mid-to-senior manager.
Recent roles have been heavily focused on Individual Contributor (IC) responsibilities rather than engineering management and strategic roadmap planning.
